data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Default values' but did not provide sufficient evidence to confirm its coverage. The linked use case outlines various custom fields but lacks explicit mention or evidence of default values being set for any of these fields. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement as the evidence does not support the existence or functionality of default values.
gaps: No evidence provided for the implementation of default values for custom fields.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
